channel.title: Python on Zymacs
channel.description: Recent content in Python on Zymacs

item.title: Installing python3 on Linux
item.description: Python comes pre-installed on most Linux distros. But if for whichever reason it isn’t installed on yours, here’s how to fix that; First, let’s update and upgrade your system If you are on Ubuntu, run: sudo apt update && sudo apt upgrade For Arch, run: sudo pacman -Syu Fedora: sudo dnf upgrade Now let’s install python (plus some extra packages you will most definitely eventually need when using python) Ubuntu
